creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Neil Alexander from comment #2)

That patch also has not been made against the ports tree, but rather against some random repository that only has your port.  This is not very helpful.  You can find the ports repository here:

    https://git.freebsd.org/ports

or here:

    https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-ports

I managed to apply this patch manually, but it would really be great if you could just do it properly.

Also note that the author field is set to some weird github address in the patch you submitted.  I'll set it to your name and email address as used here on Bugzilla.
